summary: I'm an AI/ML Engineer with 5+ years of experience building RAG pipelines, multi-agent systems, and ML models that work in production. Currently at Deloitte, I turn complex AI problems into scalable, observable systems. I build fast, ship clean, and care about results.

highlights: Specialization in Data Science and AI

description: Built RAG pipelines using LangChain, OpenAI embeddings, and ChromaDB with agentic retrieval routing, improving response accuracy by 28% and cutting manual research time significantly.
Designed multi-agent workflows using CrewAI and LangGraph for automated document analysis and task routing, reducing analyst effort by 22%.
Architected agentic microservices with FastMCP and FastAPI for LLM inference and vector search, integrated with LangSmith for full observability and evaluation in production.
Trained predictive ML models with Scikit-learn and XGBoost for enterprise analytics, improving forecast accuracy by 18% through rigorous cross-validation and hyperparameter tuning.
Built OCR pipelines using Google Document AI and Tesseract integrated into agentic extraction workflows, cutting manual data entry by 42%.
Deployed ML and LLM models to GCP using Vertex AI and Cloud Run with Docker and MLflow for tracking and versioning.
Built model monitoring pipelines tracking prediction drift, latency, and quality metrics, enabling automated retraining and sustained production performance.
Built a classification model using XGBoost to flag anomalous transactions, improving detection accuracy by 20%.
Developed a regression model for transaction volume forecasting, improving forecast accuracy by 21% to support capacity planning.
Built end-to-end ML pipelines with Python, PySpark, and Scikit-learn, improving processing efficiency by 24% across reporting workflows.
Performed EDA and statistical testing on financial datasets using Python, Pandas, and SQL to surface features that improved model design.
Validated models using hypothesis testing and significance analysis to meet governance and audit compliance standards.

projects.title: Production-Grade Advanced RAG Tool
projects.description: A research-grade RAG system built with four architectural pillars: Pre-Retrieval, Advanced Retrieval, Post-Retrieval, and Self-RAG generation. Evaluated using a Tesla Owner's Manual corpus with RAGAS metrics tracked end-to-end in LangSmith. Implements HyDE, hybrid retrieval, parent-child chunking, cross-encoder reranking, and page indexing.

projects.title: HRMS MCP Server
projects.description: A production-ready MCP server for HR Management built with FastMCP and Groq API. Exposes HR workflows as callable tools including employee management, leave tracking, and organizational data queries. Leveraged Claude Code and prompt engineering during development to design tool schemas and system architecture. Designed to plug directly into any MCP-compatible host, making HR operations accessible to LLM-powered agents without custom API integrations.

projects.title: MCP Host Chat Interface
projects.description: A fully custom MCP host chat interface built from scratch using Node.js and the Groq API. Leveraged Claude Code for accelerated development, applied system design principles to architect the host layer, and used prompt engineering to control tool discovery, execution flow, and conversation behavior. Built as an independent alternative to Claude Desktop and Codex, giving full control over the MCP host layer with multi-turn conversation state managed entirely within a standalone interface.

projects.title: Portfolio Builder
projects.description: An open source portfolio website builder deployed on Vercel, built to help friends create and manage their own portfolio sites without writing code. Entirely designed and developed using prompt engineering, system design, and Claude Code — from architecting the Supabase schema and auth flows to building the admin and user dashboards, approval flows, and multi-theme system. Resend handles transactional emails throughout the platform. Made fully open source so anyone can self-host, contribute, or build on top of it.

projects.title: Credit Risk Prediction Model
projects.description: A machine learning classification model that predicts credit default risk based on borrower financial profiles. Applied feature engineering, class imbalance handling, and cross-validation to optimize precision and recall. Evaluated across multiple algorithms with XGBoost delivering the strongest performance on holdout data.

projects.title: Healthcare Premium Prediction
projects.description: A regression model that predicts individual health insurance premiums based on demographic and health features. Performed EDA to identify key premium drivers, applied feature transformations, and benchmarked multiple regression algorithms. Designed to support pricing and risk assessment workflows in healthcare.

projects.title: A/B Testing for Credit Card Launch
projects.description: A full A/B testing analysis for a new credit card product launch. Designed the experiment structure, defined control and treatment groups, and ran hypothesis tests to determine statistical significance of conversion and engagement metrics. Delivered data-driven recommendations on whether to proceed with the full rollout.

projects.title: E-Commerce Chatbot
projects.description: A semantic routing-based chatbot for e-commerce that classifies and routes customer queries intelligently. Uses embedding-based routing to handle product, order, and support intents without brittle rule logic.
